links.title: Huoneet
links.tooltip: View room temperatures with floor plans

links.title: HVAC
links.tooltip: View HVAC ventilation and energy details

links.title: Valot
links.tooltip: View light switch status by floor

targets.query:
from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "bedroom" or r.room_type == "common" or r.room_type == "basement")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "Kellari_eteinen")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Sisälämpötila"}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.supply_temp and exists r.return_temp)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: 1.965 * (r.supply_temp - r.return_temp), _field: "thermal_power"}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value >= 0.0 and r._value <= 15.0)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "pid")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Lämmitystarve"}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pm2_5")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2")
  |> last()

import "array"

keittio = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

takka = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Takka")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

array.from(rows: [{_time: now(), _value: keittio._value - takka._value, _field: "IVK tila"}])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "compressor")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "aux_heater_3kw")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> last()

temps = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.supply_temp and exists r.return_temp)

status = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "compressor" or r._field == "aux_heater_3kw" or r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.compressor and exists r.aux_heater_3kw and exists r.aux_heater_6kw)

join(tables: {temps: temps, status: status}, on: ["_time"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.compressor == 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: 1.965 * (r.supply_temp - r.return_temp) / 2.3, _field: "COP"}))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value >= 0.0 and r._value <= 10.0)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ulkolampotila" or r._field == "Tuloilma_ennen_lammitysta" or r._field == "Tuloilma_asetusarvo")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _time: now()}))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.Ulkolampotila and exists r.Tuloilma_ennen_lammitysta and exists r.Tuloilma_asetusarvo)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.Tuloilma_asetusarvo != r.Ulkolampotila)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: (r.Tuloilma_ennen_lammitysta - r.Ulkolampotila) / (r.Tuloilma_asetusarvo - r.Ulkolampotila) * 100.0,
    _field: "LTO hyötysuhde"
  }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0.0 and r._value <= 100.0)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ulkolampotila" or r._field == "Kastepiste" or r._field == "Jateilma")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _time: now()}))
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.Ulkolampotila and exists r.Kastepiste and exists r.Jateilma)
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
      margin = r.Jateilma - r.Kastepiste

      dew_raw = (5.0 - margin) / 5.0
      dew_risk = if dew_raw < 0.0 then 0.0 else if dew_raw > 1.0 then 1.0 else dew_raw
      dew_score = dew_risk * 60.0

      temp_raw = (-5.0 - r.Ulkolampotila) / 20.0
      temp_risk = if temp_raw < 0.0 then 0.0 else if temp_raw > 1.0 then 1.0 else temp_raw
      temp_score = temp_risk * 25.0

      exh_raw = (5.0 - r.Jateilma) / 5.0
      exh_risk = if exh_raw < 0.0 then 0.0 else if exh_raw > 1.0 then 1.0 else exh_raw
      exh_score = exh_risk * 15.0

      total = dew_score + temp_score + exh_score
      prob = if r.Jateilma < 0.0 then 60.0
             else if margin < 0.0 then (if total > 95.0 then 95.0 else if total < 80.0 then 80.0 else total)
             else if total > 95.0 then 95.0
             else total

      return {_time: r._time, _value: prob, _field: "Jäätymisriski"}
  })

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Ulkolämpötila")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Ruuvi ulko"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "outdoor_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Thermia ulko"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hvac")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Ulkolampotila")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "HVAC ulko"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rooms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.room_type == "bedroom" or r.room_type == "common" or r.room_type == "basement")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "Kellari_eteinen")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "floor"])
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: if r.floor == "2" then "2. kerros" else if r.floor == "1" then "1. kerros" else "Kellari"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ruuvi" and r.sensor_name == "Keittiö")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voc" or r._field == "pm2_5")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

import "date"
import "experimental"

today_start = date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: today_start, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Mennyt"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

import "date"
import "experimental"

tomorrow_start = experimental.addDuration(d: 1d, to: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: now(), stop: tomorrow_start)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Tuleva"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

import "date"
import "experimental"

tomorrow_start = experimental.addDuration(d: 1d, to: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d))
tomorrow_end = experimental.addDuration(d: 2d, to: date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1d))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: tomorrow_start, stop: tomorrow_end)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "electricity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "price_with_tax")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Hinta (sis. ALV)"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])
